description: Create an Environment content slide with a left sidebar question prompt and a right-side horizontal grouped bar chart showing likely vs unlikely responses plus 2023 likely comparisons.

header.headline: Environment
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

sidebar.body: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

rows: There will be more extreme weather events in [COUNTRY] in 2025 than there were in 2024
The government in [COUNTRY] will introduce more demanding targets to reduce carbon emissions more quickly
There will be more restrictions introduced to reduce the amount people drive in their cars in [COUNTRY]
Parts of my country will become unliveable because of an extreme weather event
There will be a breakthrough technology developed which will halt climate change

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
